title: tephrosia boiviniana
intro: Tephrosia boiviniana, also known as Boivin's horsefly tree or Boivin's tephrosia, is a plant species belonging to the pea family Fabaceae. It is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Madagascar, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's extracts have been shown to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Tephrosia boiviniana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and is often used in traditional remedies for its purported therapeutic effects.
